overall.description: First-person perspective inside a futuristic metro train in Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through Night City. The clip begins with exploration of the train interior featuring passengers and neon advertisements, then transitions to views of the sprawling neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape through the windows as the train travels along elevated tracks.

segments.scene_description: Inside a futuristic metro train car with brown upholstered seats and yellow structural pillars. Passengers sit quietly while neon signs glow outside the windows. The camera pans around examining interior details including a prominent sports advertisement and digital route displays hanging from the ceiling.

approaches train window with exterior city lights becoming visible through the glass

passenger standing by the window looking out at the city

segments.scene_description: Moving through the train aisle past standing passengers holding luggage. The camera approaches the window area where the red 'GLEN NORT' neon sign is visible in the distance. The interior lighting mixes with the glow from exterior city lights as the train continues moving.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track view of dense cyberpunk cityscape with towering skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The train travels along elevated tracks through the dense cyberpunk cityscape of Night City. Towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows pass by closely, while massive neon billboards and holographic advertisements light up the night. The view curves around buildings revealing the 'TENGU' hotel sign and various corporate advertisements plastered across the futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that moves from the intimate interior of a futuristic metro train into a sweeping view of a neon-drenched cityscape. It begins by panning across brown upholstered seats and yellow structural pillars, examining digital route displays and sports advertisements while passengers sit quietly. As the camera glides through the aisle past standing commuters, the interior lighting begins to blend with the external glow of the city, drawing the viewer toward the windows where a red Glen Nort sign flickers in the distance. The scene then expands as the train travels along elevated tracks, shifting the focus entirely to the towering skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards of Night City. Finally, the view curves around the futuristic architecture to reveal the Tengu hotel sign and a dense array of corporate advertisements illuminating the night.
